title: Scripture Reference
description: Canonical machine-readable Scripture reference. Identical shape to content/harmony/robertson-1922-outline.json (#6) so lessons, the harmony dataset, and the S6 round-trip never drift. References only — never Scripture text (docs/content-rights.md).

book.description: Full English book name, e.g. "Mark", "1 Corinthians". If abbreviations or OSIS codes are needed later they become additional fields; this field never changes meaning.

deep_link.description: Optional deep link to a licensed online rendering (e.g. VIE2010). Null until the link convention lands (#1/#2 rights conversations).
